temp_anomaly.description: Projected temperature anomaly above 1990 baseline (°C), CMIP6 global grid

precip_change_pct.description: Projected precipitation change vs 1990 baseline (% of baseline daily mean), CMIP6 global grid

vulnerability.description: Country ND-GAIN vulnerability score (0–1, lower is less vulnerable)

readiness.description: Country ND-GAIN readiness score (0–1, higher is more ready)
